title: 11 ditey z Morshyna
overview: Everyone knows that Morshyn was built on a meteorite crash site, which is rich in a rare metal osmium. Wanting to earn easy money, Snizhana decides to deceive everyone and take possession of a valuable object. Anything could have happened if  11 children from Morshyn had not gotten in her way. Uniting into a single front for  the sake of a greater goal, they start fighting injustice
